name: Crew Flavor Tables
description: Five Parsecs From Home crew characterization tables (p.31)

1-10.description: Hired by a random member of the group
1-10.details: Professional relationship turned into something more.

11-20.description: Pursuit of random group member's motivation

21-30.description: Being in trouble with the authorities
21-30.details: Running from the law makes strange bedfellows.

41-50.details: Ideology or faith brought them together.

51-65.description: A random meeting in a bar
51-65.details: Classic spacer tradition of crew recruitment.

66-75.details: Worked together before and decided to stick together.

76-90.description: Mutual protection in a hostile universe
76-90.details: Safety in numbers in dangerous times.

91-100.details: Served together in a conflict and stayed together after.

1-12.details: Charming scoundrels with hearts of gold.

13-21.details: Business-like and efficient in their work.

29-34.details: Fighting for those who can't fight for themselves.

49-58.details: Lowlifes scraping by on the fringe.

59-72.details: Criminals with a code of conduct.

88-100.details: Adventurers loving life on the fringe.
